programme.desc: Amy (Jennifer Morrison), Travis (Matthew Davis) and Graham (Joseph Lawrence) would love to make it big in Hollywood. First, they must survive their last semester at Alpine University, where their thesis films will vie for the prestigious Hitchcock Award.

programme.title: Urban Legends: Bloody Mary, (2005, Slashers and Serial Killers)
programme.desc: On a prom-night dare, a trio of high-school friends chant an incantation, unleashing an evil spirit from the past with deadly consequences.

programme.title: Carrie, (2013, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: Chloë Grace Moretz and Julianne Moore star in this exhilarating reimagining of Stephen King's iconic best-seller, 'Carrie.' After merciless taunting and abuse, events spiral out of control until the terrifying conclusion of this horror story.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Attack, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and Koichi come under the attack of Yoshikage Kira’s Stand bomb, called Heart Attack. Narrowly escaping the blast, Koichi tries to go after the serial killer but is stopped by Jotaro, who tells him to focus on dealing with the Stand bomb first.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and Killua have gained new allies and prepare to charge into battle.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: With only one more day remaining until the selection, Gon, Killua and Ikalgo go over their strategy.

programme.desc: Welfin, a wolf-like Chimera Ant, has realized that someone has infiltrated the palace. With his sharp sense of smell, he tracks down the intruders.

programme.desc: The battle between the humans and Chimera Ants is about to begin.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Zeno and Netero's sudden attack throws the palace into confusion. Concerned for the King's safety, Pitou and Pouf hurry to the King's side.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Youpi transforms and splits up the group with his attack. Morel lets Shoot and Knuckle handle things while he heads for the King.

programme.desc: Zeno's cryptic words to Killua and Gon becomes clear when they reach the tower.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Feeling the need to lay a punch on Youpi to avenge his friend Shoot, Knuckle decides to take on Youpi once more.

programme.title: Death Note: Performance

programme.title: Death Note: Guidance
programme.desc: Misa succeeds in narrowing down the Kira suspects in the Yotsuba Group to one: Higuchi.

programme.title: Death Note: Frenzy
programme.desc: Higuchi of the Yotsuba Group attempts to kill Matsuda of the task force, and is surprised when he doesn't die after 40 seconds.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yoshikage Kira Just Wants to Live Quietly, Part 1
programme.desc: A man named Yoshikage Kira is enjoying his lunch break at the park with a sandwich in hand. But his peaceful afternoon is cut short when Shigechi accidentally takes Kira’s sandwich bag, believing it to be his own.
programme.sub-title: Yoshikage Kira Just Wants to Live Quietly, Part 1

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Yoshikage Kira Just Wants to Live Quietly, Part 2
programme.desc: Yoshikage Kira is revealed to be the serial killer who’s been lurking in Morioh, and a Stand user as well. Having discovered his secret, Shigechi tries to fight off Kira with his Harvest, only to suffer fatal wounds from the killer’s Stand, Deadly Queen
programme.sub-title: Yoshikage Kira Just Wants to Live Quietly, Part 2

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Attack, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and Koichi come under the attack of Yoshikage Kira’s Stand bomb, called Heart Attack. Narrowly escaping the blast, Koichi tries to go after the serial killer but is stopped by Jotaro, who tells him to focus on dealing with the Stand bomb first.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Attack, Part 2
programme.desc: Kira is forced to appear before Koichi after his remote Heart Attack bomb is made useless by the boy’s new Stand, Reverb Act 3. Finally coming face-to-face with the serial killer, Koichi attacks him with Act 3.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Heart Father
programme.desc: Josuke and his friends are at Yoshikage Kira’s home trying to find any clues that may lead them to the serial killer, who has gone into hiding under a new face and identity.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Janken Boy Is Coming!
programme.desc: Kira’s father, Yoshihiro, begins searching for Stand users who would help protect his son from his pursuers. Meanwhile, Rohan is taking photos at the train station when he is suddenly challenged to a game of rock-paper-scissors.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: I'm an Alien
programme.desc: While on their way to school, Josuke and Okuyasu find a young man lying unconscious in the middle of what appears to be a crop circle. When they try to take a closer look, the man suddenly wakes up and starts claiming he’s an alien from outer space.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Highway Go Go, Part 1
programme.desc: Rohan is convinced that Josuke is cheating in their game of Cee-lo when all the dice rolls in his opponent’s favor. Feeling insulted, Rohan stabs his own finger and swear he’ll find out how Josuke is cheating in their next round.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Highway Go Go, Part 2
programme.desc: Rohan sacrifices himself to save Josuke from a remote-controlled Stand that sucks nutrients out of its victims. Moved by Rohan’s act of bravery, Josuke races through town to find and defeat the Stand’s user before it can kill Rohan.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Cats Love Yoshikage Kira
programme.desc: Shinobu tells her husband, Kosaku, that she saw a stray cat in their basement with a hole in its throat. When Kosaku goes down to take a look, he finds the cat already dead, The next morning, a strange plant sprouts from the spot where the cat was buried.

programme.title: Street Fighter II: The Animated Series
programme.desc: On a covert mission, Guile uncovers a nefarious plot that could lead to world destruction.

programme.title: Street Fighter II: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bison builds a powerful, and deadly, nuclear facility - with a foe in his back yard.

programme.title: Street Fighter II: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Dee Jay plots an escape plan when Guile is kidnapped.

programme.title: Street Fighter II: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Sagat ambushes a U.S. embassy, leaving young Kip trapped between life and death.

programme.title: Street Fighter II: The Animated Series
programme.desc: When Bison hijacks a covert military plane, Guile and his friends must team up to rescue the ship.

programme.title: Street Fighter II: The Animated Series
programme.desc: It is a race against the clock when Escher discovers that a powerful military laser has gone missing.

programme.title: Street Fighter II: The Animated Series
programme.desc: When Bison uses his evil powers to halt the millennium comet, the United States' future hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Paid in Full, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: A young man from Harlem, forced to cope with the 1980s drug scene, builds an illegal empire, only to have a crisis of conscience. Featuring the hit soundtrack with songs by Eric B. & Rakim, Boogie Down Productions, Guy, and Jay-Z.

programme.title: Dead Presidents, (1995, Crime)
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet, drawn to crime after the war, plans the ultimate heist.

programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: Hoodlum, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: 1930's New York. The black community of Harlem faces the same indignities as countless millions of refugees. If the seeds of Harlem's urban power would not grow in the White city, the Black underground would form to take control.

programme.title: State Property, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: Beans decides that the only way to grasp the American Dream is to take it. STATE PROPERTY follows Beans and his crew, as they take over the city creating mayhem as their empire builds.

programme.title: State Property 2: Blood on the Streets, (2005, Family Sci-Fi & Fantasy)
programme.desc: Three gangsters vie for power in Philadelphia.

programme.title: Caught Up, (1998, Thriller)

programme.title: Paid in Full, (2002, Action)

programme.title: Fist of Fury, (1972, Action)

programme.title: The Way Of The Dragon, (1972, Action)
programme.desc: Legendary Bruce Lee's only complete directorial film is packed with action and epic fight scenes. Lee visits his relatives at their restaurant in Italy and has to help them defend against brutal gangsters harassing them.

programme.title: A Game of Death, (1978, Action)
programme.desc: Billy Lo, a champion fighter and movie star, fakes his death to escape and then expose the crime syndicate that wants to control him.

programme.title: Kill Zone, (2005, Action)

programme.desc: Incredible martial arts sequences mark this thriller about a legendary fighter who takes on ruthless outside oppressors in World War II-era Shanghai.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman, (2011, Action)
programme.desc: Set in 198 A.D., when the Eastern Han Dynasty has collapsed into civil war, and the young Emperor is a puppet of prime minster and generalissimo Cao Cao (Jiang), the film singles out two famous chapters from Guan’s (Yen) many heroic adventures.

programme.title: Dragon, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: Liu Jin-xi (Donnie Yen) is a village craftsman whose quiet life is irrevocably shattered by the arrival of two notorious gangsters in the local general store.

programme.title: Special ID, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: An undercover cop (Donnie Yen) infiltrates one of China's most ruthless crime syndicates. He must risk everything to protect his family and his life after the boss (Collin Chou) vows to find and kill every traitor in his organization.

programme.title: Are We Done Yet?, (2007, Comedy)

programme.title: The Guilt Trip, (2012, Screwball)
programme.desc: "Barbra Streisand and Seth Rogen are the perfect comedy duo"* as they embark on one mother of a road trip! When Andy invites his mom on an 8-day, 3,000-mile journey across the country, the farther they go, the closer they get. *Jake Hamilton, FOX-TV

programme.title: Rat Race, (2001, Screwball)
programme.desc: An all-star comedy cast brings laughs from start to finish when a casino tycoon gives six money-crazed contestants the chance to win $2 million in a race from Las Vegas to New Mexico.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Another Dirty Movie, (2015, Comedy)
programme.desc: Two college film students set out to make an homage to Charlie LaRue, not for art or for money. They're doing it to get a hot chick.

programme.title: Major League, (1989, Comedy)
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians threatens to move the team unless they deliver immediate results. She then fills the roster with has-beens to guarantee their failure. But the team miraculously rallies together and starts to win.

programme.title: Nacho Libre (ENG), (2006, Comedy)

programme.title: 12 Pound Balls, (2017, Comedy)

programme.title: Serendipity, (2001, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: In the course of one magical evening, Jonathan (John Cusack) and Sara (Kate Beckinsale) meet unexpectedly, but part ways, determining that fate will guide their future if they're meant to be together.

programme.title: In & Out, (1997, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: A former student who's now an actor tells an audience of millions that Howard is gay. He's outed when he didn't know he was in! Kevin Kline plays Howard, scrambling to go forth with his wedding and doing his best to assert his manliness.

programme.title: Muriel's Wedding, (1994, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: In this perfect marriage of feel-good comedy and heartfelt drama, a shy daydreamer finds the courage to leave on a tropical vacation, where she meets a wacky new friend, changes her name, and turns her world upside down, all to an ABBA soundtrack.

programme.title: The Pallbearer, (1996, Romantic comedy)

programme.title: Payback, (1999, Action)
programme.desc: After a successful heist, Porter is left for dead. Once he recovers, he seeks vengeance and wants his share of the money.

programme.title: Almost Famous, (2000, Romance)
programme.desc: A high-school boy is given the chance to write a story for Rolling Stone Magazine about an up-and-coming rock band as he accompanies it on their concert tour.

programme.title: Eddie and the Cruisers, (1983, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.

programme.title: Priscilla, (2023, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The unseen side of a great American myth in Priscilla Presley's turbulent relationship with Elvis. Sofia Coppola (The Virgin Suicides) tells a deeply felt and ravishingly detailed portrait of love, fantasy, and fame through her eyes.

programme.title: Past Lives, (2023, Romance)
programme.desc: Nora & Hae Sung, two deeply connected childhood friends, are wrest apart after Nora's family emigrates from South Korea. Decades later, they are reunited for one fateful week as they confront destiny, love, and the choices that make a life.

programme.title: Licorice Pizza, (2021, Romantic comedy)
programme.desc: Licorice Pizza' is the story of Alana Kane and Gary Valentine growing up, running around and falling in love in the San Fernando Valley, 1973. Written and Directed by Paul Thomas Anderson, the film tracks the treacherous navigation of first love.

programme.title: Stepmom, (1998, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: An unlikely friendship develops when a mother of two is forced to teach another woman to raise her kids. Julia Roberts and Susan Sarandon star.

programme.title: Ginger & Rosa, (2013, Historical Drama)
programme.desc: In 1962 London, the lifelong friendship between two teenagers (Elle Fanning, Alice Englert) dissolves after one seduces the other's father.

programme.title: Young Guns, (1988, Action)
programme.desc: In a lawless and violent time, six young outcasts are hired by an English merchant as 'regulators' to guard his ranch against the mob, a corrupt and powerful ring.

programme.title: Young Guns II, (1990, Action)

programme.title: Quigley Down Under, (1990, Action)

programme.title: Death Rides a Horse, (1967, Western)
programme.desc: A young boy is a witness the murder of his family. Fifteen years later he sets of to find the four killers. Along the way he befriends another cowboy out for the same revenge.

programme.title: Hondo, (1953, Western)
programme.desc: John Wayne plays Hondo Lane, a cavalry rider who becomes the protector of Angie Lowe as well as a father figure to her boy, Johnny. Angie, determinedly awaiting the return of her husband, refuses to leave their homestead despite the growing danger.

programme.title: The Sons of Katie Elder, (1965, Western)
programme.desc: The four rowdy sons of Katie Elder return home for her funeral and to avenge her death.

programme.title: El Dorado, (1966, Western)
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum plays to perfection an alcoholic but gutsy sheriff who relentlessly battles the dark side of the wild West, ruthless cattle barons and crooked “businessmen.”

programme.title: True Grit, (1969, Western)

programme.desc: After his uncle dies, a young boy learns of his relative's true occupation as an undercover spy and is later recruited to be undercover himself. Based on the novel by Anthony Horowitz.

programme.title: Blue Velvet, (1986, Thriller)

programme.title: Bound, (1995, Thriller)
programme.desc: Caesar’s a guy who launders money for the mob. What’s the last thing that would come between a sleazy wise guy like Caesar and that money? A couple of women with brains to die for and bodies to match.

programme.title: The Chumscrubber, (2005, Comedy)

programme.title: An ominous black smoke appears over the Land of Greens, and all of sudden Choji and company are attacked by an unidentified Ninja!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: While questioning Yurinoshin and Shun, the Hidden Leaf squad learns the truth about Shun's true identity.

programme.title: Naruto and the others are attacked by Ruiga, the first evil ninja, who can draw water from the earth to use as weapons.

programme.title: Naruto is again attacked by the second evil ninja, Jiga. Jiga threatens Naruto's life when Hinata rushes in to save Naruto, but Hinata resists the threats and begins to fight!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto and Haruna are confronted by Renga. Declaring that he has taken down others before them, he advances on Naruto, ordering him to hand over the princess!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: The princess has gained weight due to nerves and wants Ino to pose as the princess in order to attend the first meeting with a prince she adores.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Lee opens a dojo because he feels like he isn't keeping up with his training. He is hoping challengers will come to his dojo to face him in battle.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: The first lady of the Land of Honey and her entourage have disappeared. Naruto, Kiba, and Hinata are sent on a mission and they discover an eerie castle looming in the middle of the road!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: During Lee's medical check-up, he discovers that there's a lot of damage in his chakra network. Guy tries to cheer him up by taking Lee to the Academy training hall.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Seeking revenge for his dead father, Genho, Yagura's true identity and oldest sibling of the Ryudoin Brothers confronts Guy using a unique Jutsu.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: The ANBU Black Ops suspect that Genno, a carpenter of Hidden Leaf Village, stole important blueprints of the village. Tsunade concludes that the one who used Genno plans to attack the Village and puts the village on Super S-Rank Alert!
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: ANBU Black Ops puts Naruto under retro-hypnosis to extract Genno's motives. Without much success, Hidden Waterfall Village will be conducting maneuvers close to the village borders.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: While looking for the scattered blueprints, Naruto and his team realize that Genno's actions are a diversion.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto and the others are shocked at the number of paper bombs placed throughout the village. While removing the seals, unexpected help arrives in the way of Homura and Koharu.

programme.title: Naruto confronts Genno, and Shikamaru realizes that all the traps are all diversions. Genno's intention was to bury the village in a rockslide. Can the 11 ninjas save the village from destruction?

programme.title: Naruto Uzumaki and Sakura Haruno take the microphones as hosts and then the program begins.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto encounters a young girl named Yakumo drawing a strange picture. The ANBU Black Ops and the Medical Corps arrive and whisk her away.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto has a dream about Yakumo wishing to become a ninja and Kurenai threatens to seal her power.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: The assailants are members of the Kurama Clan of Hidden Leaf Village. Naruto and company rush to the villa to protect Yakumo.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Naruto goes to the hospital, when Unkai the ninja, who attacked them at the villa, appears. They search the village and come up with a theory based on the movement of Shino’s parasitic insects.

programme.title: Naruto finds that Yakumo has put Kurenai in a desperate situation, and the terrible secret of the Kurama villa reveals itself.

programme.title: While in battle, Naruto finds out that Menma is a member of the gang of bandits that attacked their village. Being called a traitor by the leader of the gang, Menma reveals his greatest secret.
programme.desc: Naruto

programme.desc: Naruto

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths, (2012, Comedy)
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter inadvertently becomes entangled in the Los Angeles criminal underworld after his oddball friends kidnap a gangster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: The Professional, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: The mysterious Leon (Jean Reno) is New York's top hitman. When his next-door neighbors are murdered, Leon becomes the unwilling guardian of the family's sole survivor - 12-year-old Mathilda (Natalie Portman). Rating:R

programme.title: Killing Them Softly, (2012, Crime)
programme.desc: During the economic turmoil of 2008, Jackie Cogan (Brad Pitt), an enforcer, is hired to restore order after three idiots rob a mob-protected poker game.

programme.title: MAFIA, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: In the 1970s, a fierce crime boss (Ving Rhames) wreaks havoc on the streets. Detective Womack (Pam Grier) decides to put an end to this organized crime – even if it means breaking the law.

programme.title: Better Luck Tomorrow, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: Mob Town, (2019, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The FBI and a local cop track various members of organized crime families as they gather for a huge meeting in upstate New York in 1957.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths, (2012, Comedy)
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter inadvertently becomes entangled in the Los Angeles criminal underworld after his oddball friends kidnap a gangster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Better Luck Tomorrow, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: To his classmates and teachers, high-schooler Ben Manibag appears to be the model student: a perfectionist and overachiever. But underneath this persona is a darker side. Ben and his bored high-school buddies lead double lives.

programme.title: Seven Samurai, (1956, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: Farmers from a village exploited by bandits hire a veteran samurai for protection, and he gathers six other samurai to join him.

programme.title: Ran, (1985, Foreign Drama)
programme.desc: Ran, Akira Kurosawa’s visually dazzling samurai epic, is the story of Lord Hidetora and his three warring sons. A cinematic masterpiece, in sumptuous digital 4K (where available).

programme.title: Rashomon, (1951, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: The rape of a bride and the murder of her samurai husband are recalled from the perspectives of a bandit, the bride, the samurai's ghost and a woodcutter.

programme.title: High And Low, (1963, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: An executive of a Yokohama shoe company becomes a victim of extortion when his chauffeur's son is kidnapped by mistake and held for ransom.

programme.title: Lady Snowblood, (1974, Action)
programme.desc: A young woman is trained from birth to be a deadly instrument of revenge against the swindlers who destroyed her family.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dollars, (1967, Action)
programme.desc: The Man With No Name (Clint Eastwood) receives offers from two gangs terrorizing a small town and accepts both, setting in motion a plan to destroy the criminals in a series of brilliantly orchestrated setups, showdowns, and deadly confrontations.

programme.title: For A Few Dollars More, (1967, Action)
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood returns as the Man With No Name, who teams up with equally lethal Colonel Mortimer (Lee Van Cleef) in pursuit of a sadistic killer and his band of desperadoes in this non-stop action classic from legendary director Sergio Leone.

programme.title: Galaxy Quest, (1999, Adventure)
programme.desc: Nearly twenty years after the cult TV show Galaxy Quest was cancelled, the alumni cast is asked for help by an alien species in order to save the universe.

programme.title: Multiplicity, (1996, Screwball)
programme.desc: Michael Keaton and Andie MacDowell star in director Harold Ramis' brilliant comedy about a man who clones himself to save his marriage, and then almost loses his wife to himself! Keaton takes on four hilariously distinct roles.

programme.title: Encino Man, (1992, Comedy)
programme.desc: Two high school buddies dig up a frozen caveman in their backyard!

programme.title: Jawbreaker, (1999, Comedy)

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei and Crow set off to confront the Dark Signers in an effort to stop them from destroying the Satellite Sector.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: In an effort to save the Satellite Sector from being destroyed, Yusei agrees to face off against a former friend turned Dark Signer in a Shadow Duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Yusei confronts his former friend Kalin about their past in an effort to stop him from awakening the Army of Shadows.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: The safety of the world hangs in the balance as Yusei tries to figure out a way to outduel and outmaneuver the unstoppable power of Kalin's dark deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Leo is forced to take part in an extrasensory examination with the leader of the Arcadia Movement. Can Leo pass this pop quiz, or will this psychic showdown with Sayer leave Leo locked up forever?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With Lazar's creepy clowns about to crack Crow's defense, Crow hatches a plan to lull his opponent into a false sense of security so that his feathered friends can swoop in and swipe the last of Lazar's life points.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei gets caught up in a web of lies after agreeing to square off against Roman, the leader of the Dark Signers.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the safety of his friends literally hanging in the balance, Yusei must figure out a way to squash Roman's Earthbound Immortal before it sends him and his pals to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Luna gears up to face Devack in a Shadow Duel, but before the first card can be thrown, Luna is transported back to the Spirit World, leaving her pint-sized brother Leo the tall task of taking down this Dark Signer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As Luna searches the Spirit World for a way to free Ancient Fairy Dragon from her stone prison, Leo searches his deck for a card combo that will help him defeat Devack and his army of apes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Luna and her new found friend Torunka hatch a plan to free Regulus from King Zeman's minus curse. Meanwhile, back in the Satellite Sector, Leo calls upon his Power Tool Dragon to help him dismantle Devack's dark deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: When Luna's plan to free Ancient Fairy Dragon falls apart, Regulus must come to her rescue in order to save her and the Spirit World from Zeman's minus curse.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Carly sets out hoping to uncover the mystery behind the Crimson Dragon, but after digging up some damaging dirt on the Arcadia Movement, she soon finds herself squaring off in a psychic duel with Sayer.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Sayer signs up for a Shadow Duel against a Dark Signer who's out for revenge while Akiza agrees to battle a dark and sinister supermodel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the Dark Signer double duel draws to a climactic close, Carly and Misty unfold a catastrophic card combo that could send Akiza and Sayer to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After Akiza falls into a state of unconsciousness, her father turns to Yusei in a last ditch effort to wake his beloved daughter from her catatonic condition.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the battle between Signers presses on, Yusei turns to his trusty Stardust Dragon in an effort to keep the power of Akiza's Black Rose Dragon at bay.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With Yusei, Jack, Akiza and Luna all gathered together, Director Goodwin seizes the moment and decides to shed some light on the dark and formidable foes the four Signers will soon be battling.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: In an effort to rid the Satellite Sector of the Dark Signers, Crow ventures out and challenges a sinister looking sneak to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Crow challenges the newest member of the Dark Signers to a Turbo Duel, but before Crow's Blackwings can even take flight, his opponent unleashes an aerial assault of his own.
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 1

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the sky-high battle between Crow and Greiger heats up, Crow looks to elevate his game in order to ground Greiger's aerial attacks before they send him to the Netherworld forever.
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 2

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points on the line, Crow turns to his feathered friends in a last ditch effort to take out Greiger's Earthbound Immortal. Can Crow and his Blackwing's rise to the occasion?
programme.sub-title: A Whale of a Ride, Part 3

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Haunted by the memories of his last battle with Kalin, Yusei looks to bury the past by agreeing to duel his former friend in a rematch. Can Yusei defeat Kalin and seal the tower that this Dark Signer is guarding?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the rematch between Kalin and Yusei continues, Yusei must find a way to out-think and out-maneuver the dark power of Kalin's Earthbound Immortal before it sends him to the Netherworld forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Roman challenges Yusei to a Shadow Duel at the site of the original Ener-D Reactor. Meanwhile, Director Goodwin decides to make an unexpected visit to the Satellite Sector to settle some unfinished business he has with his Dark Signer brother.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: As the battle between Yusei and Roman rages on, Roman takes a time out to reveal the truth behind the original Ener-D Reactor's meltdown and the role Yusei's father played.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Jack agrees to Turbo Duel Carly in an effort to defeat the darkness that has taken control of her. Can Jack rid the evil that has come to possess this one-time roving reporter?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Jack kicks his duel into overdrive and summons his Red Dragon Archfiend in a desperate attempt to free Carly from the Dark Signers' control.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Hoping to finally find out the whereabouts of her long-lost brother, Misty challenges Akiza to a Shadow Duel in a maze of mirrors.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: After unlocking Akiza's psychic powers, Sayer sets his sights on using them to get even with the Dark Signers for destroying the Arcadia Movement.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: Yusei, Jack and Crow face off against Goodwin in the ultimate Shadow Duel showdown.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With the safety of the world hanging in the balance, Yusei, Jack and Crow look to tip the scales in their favor by setting their sights on Goodwin's Earthbound Immortal.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
programme.desc: With his life points running on empty, Yusei looks to rev it up one last time in order to defeat Goodwin and save the world from the destructive powers of the King of the Netherworld!

programme.title: Nami battles a bathing beauty and her lethal bubbles, Chopper unleashes his inner beast, and Luffy inches ever closer to catching up with Robin!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Bubble master kalifa! The soap trap closes in on nami!

programme.title: Franky has a painful encounter with monster Chopper, and Nami gets scrubbed too clean to fight! Meanwhile, Spandam accidentally invokes the deadly Buster Call!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Resounding bad news! Buster call invoked!

programme.title: Zoro uses Usopp as a decoy in his battle with the beasts, and Nami discovers the secret that could be the key to survival in her brawl with the bathing beauty!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Five namis? Nami strikes back with mirages!

programme.title: Franky and Nami come up with a plan to stop Chopper’s rampage, but it could prove deadly to the not-so-little reindeer. Usopp and Zoro are thrilled to finally be free of each other!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Nami's decision! Fire at the out-of-control chopper!

programme.title: Usopp’s ill-advised attempt at bravery threatens to get him killed, but a familiar foot spares the sniper’s life. Luffy struggles to even strike a formidable foe, and Franky races to deliver some very important keys!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hunter sanji makes an entrance? Elegy for a lying wolf!

programme.title: Sanji evens the playing field in his CP9 slugfest by introducing his wolfish opponent to the burning power of the devil’s leg!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fiery kicks! Sanji's full course of foot techniques!

programme.title: Zoro finally lands a blow against the killer giraffe, but Luffy still can’t find a way to break through against Lucci! Can Frank reach Robin before it’s too late!?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fierce sword attacks! Zoro vs. Kaku, powerful sword fighting showdown!

programme.title: Zoro unleashes a demonic nine sword fighting style on his giraffe opponent, Luffy buys time for Franky by ascending to second gear, and Robin refuses to give up hope of being rescued!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Demon god zoro! An incarnation of asura born from fighting spirit!

programme.title: Spandam cruely drags Robin ever closer to the gates of justice, but the battle takes a turn for the better when the Sniper King makes a surprise appearance!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Spandam frightened! The hero on the tower of law!

programme.title: Luffy’s battle with Lucci reveals the powerful secrets of the rubber man’s second gear, and the Spandam’s thoughtless Buster Call begins with a brutal barrage of cannonballs.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Robin freed! Luffy vs. Lucci, showdown between leaders!

programme.title: When an ancient tree is stolen by a madman with the power to freeze time, Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji track down the culprit in an attempt to save a village’s annual festival!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Boss luffy is the culprit? Track down the missing great cherry tree!

programme.title: Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Zoro, and company find themselves trapped in a tunnel filled with rapidly rising water. Meanwhile, Luffy musters the strength for one last stand in his battle with Lucci.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I can't protect anyone unless i win! Third gear activated!

programme.title: Flashback to the dark past of Rob Lucci as the young boy learns to dispense a cold, cruel, and brutal brand of justice. Back in real time, Luffy’s battle with Lucci threatens to destroy the navy fleet.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shivering past! Dark justice and rob lucci!

programme.title: Luffy’s gigantic attack on Lucci takes a devastating toll on his body, Robin rejoins the fight, and the rest of the Straw Hats struggle to survive underwater!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A mysterious mermaid appears? As consciousness fades away…

programme.title: Thanks to a little help from what appears to be a mermaid, the Straw Hats find themselves reunited aboard an escape vessel, but the fate of Luffy and the Franky Family is yet to be determined!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Cannon fire sinks the island! Franky's lamentation!

programme.title: Luffy pushes his body to the breaking point in his battle with Lucci, and the rest of the Straw Hats try to fight off a fleet of Marines until their captain returns – if he ever does.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Wait for luffy! Mortal combat on the bridge of hesitation!

programme.title: Luffy lies battered and badly beaten, but Usopp’s desperate pleas inspire the rubber-man to mount one final, furious attack on Rob Lucci!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fists full of emotion! Luffy unleashes gatling with all his might!

programme.title: With their leader crippled by exhaustion and their escape ship destroyed, the Straw Hats find themselves with only one treacherous option: throwing themselves into the sea!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: From the sea, a friend arrives! The straw hats share the strongest bond!

programme.title: The Straw Hats are rescued by the unexpected arrival of a dear old friend, but they’ll have to avoid a barrage of deadly cannonballs in order to survive!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everyone makes a great escape! The road to victory is for the pirates!

programme.title: The Straw Hats bid a tearful farewell to the brave little ship that was their home for so very many adventures. Rest in peace, Merry!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Thank you, merry! Snow falls over the parting sea!

programme.title: The Straw Hats get some much needed rest and relaxation, Franky makes a big announcement, and Vice Admiral Garp tracks down his grandson!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Peace interrupted! A navy vice admiral with a fist of love!

programme.title: Luffy’s friends are shocked to learn that his grandpa is a marine hero, but that’s nothing compared to how surprised they’ll be by his father’s true identity!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The strongest family? Luffy's father revealed!

programme.title: Luffy gets the chance to catch up with his old friend Coby, Nami does some serious snooping, and Robin is paid a chilling visit from a terrifying face from her past.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Its name is the new world! The fate of the grand line!

programme.title: Shanks visits Whitebeard with a serious request, Franky and Iceberg begin construction on a ship for the Straw Hats, and news spreads of the events at Enies Lobby.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Shanks makes a move! The linchpin to the reckless era!

programme.title: Luffy and Chopper risk their lives to help a heartbroken young girl track down her long lost pet!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A girl in search of her yagara! Great search in the city of water!

programme.title: Zoro’s day takes a turn for the crazy when his search for a new sword is derailed by a couple of meddling orphans!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Mothers are strong! Zoro's hectic household chores!

programme.title: Sanji spends the day with a very old chef who teaches him the secret of packing amazing flavor into each and every dish!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Sanji's shock! Mysterious old man and his super yummy cooking!

programme.title: Franky and Iceberg stay up all night on a mission to finish a new ship for the Straw Hats, but the first light of day brings troubling news!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everyone finally has a bounty! A pirate group worth over 600 million!

programme.title: With their new ship completed, Luffy and the gang get ready to set sail, but first, they’ll have to steal some underpants in order to secure the services of a shipwright!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The king of animals that overlooks the sea! The dream ship magnificently completed!

programme.title: A series of flashbacks to his younger days – and some painful persuasion by Robin – help Franky make the difficult decision to leave his friends and go to sea with the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Goodbye my dear underlings! Franky departs!

programme.title: Luffy and the Straw Hats are ready for their next adventure, but before they can move on they must await the return of Usopp – and avoid a barrage of cannonballs courtesy of Garp!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Departing the city of water! Usopp mans up and brings closure to the duel!

programme.title: The Straw Hats’ new ship gets a name, and Franky shows off some of its special features as the gang goes sky high to avoid being sunk by the marines!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Wanted posters make it around the world! Celebration in their hometowns as the ship moves forward!

programme.title: Ace and Blackbeard go toe-to-toe in an epic clash of Devil Fruit powers that pits fire against darkness – and threatens to destroy an entire island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The most heinous power! Blackbeard's darkness attacks ace!

programme.title: The Demon Girl Next Door

programme.title: The Demon Girl Next Door

programme.sub-title: The Pink Method!! The Wheel of Fate is a Round Tire!!

programme.title: O Amante, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Um homem que, após a morte da sua esposa, descobre que ela tinha um amante há vários anos, embarca numa viagem que o leva a Inglaterra, Alemanha e Itália para encontrar o amante da sua esposa e descobrir toda a verdade sobre aquela mulher. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Liam Neeson, Antonio Banderas, Laura Linney, Romola Garai, Abigail Canton, Pam Ferris, Paterson Joseph, Craig Parkinson, Lola Peploe, Sophie Wu Diretor: Richard Eyre

programme.title: Sobreviva a noite, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Um intenso filme de ação, que traz Dolph Lundgren como um agente da Interpol protegendo sua esposa e filha de um criminoso implacável e seus mercenários em um vilarejo italiano. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dolph Lundgren, Hal Yamanouchi, Natalie Burn Diretor: Giorgio Bruno

programme.title: Instinto Selvagem 2, (2006)
programme.desc: 2006. A romancista Catherine está novamente em apuros com a lei e a Scotland Yard nomeia o psiquiatra Dr. Michael Glass para avaliá-la. No entanto, como o detetive Nick Curran antes dele, Glass fica fascinado por Tramell e é atraído para um jogo sedutor. Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Sharon Stone, David Morrissey, Charlotte Rampling, David Thewlis, Stan Collymore, Indira Varma, Heathcote Williams, Hugh Dancy, Terence Harvey, Jan Ch... Diretor: Michael Caton-Jones

programme.title: Sem Lei, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Um grupo de três amigos planeja um grande roubo que acaba dando errado quando um deles se revela um traidor. Enganado, Sonny decide assumir o problema de frente e busca vingança contra o antigo parceiro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: 50 Cent, Bruce Willis, Ryan Phillippe Diretor: Mike Gunther

programme.title: Os 800, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Em 1937, oitocentos soldados chineses lutam sob cerco em Xangai, de um armazém no meio do campo de batalha, completamente cercado pelo exército japonês. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Zhizhong Huang, Junyi Zhang, Hao Ou Diretor: Hu Guan

programme.title: A Vinganca é Minha, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Após o ataque a seu complexo, Kane enterra seus amigos e parte para vingar suas mortes. Monte uma nova equipe e siga o caminho através da fronteira para Vancouver. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Aaron Atkins, Crystal Balint, Steve Bacic Diretor: Keoni Waxman

programme.title: A Perseguição, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Ottway trabalha em um lugar isolado no Alasca. Certo dia, quando retornava à cidade para matar a saudade da esposa, o avião cai. Feridos e sem alimentos, os sobreviventes lutam pela vida e tentam reencontrar a civilização. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dermot Mulroney, Frank Grillo, Liam Neeson Diretor: Joe Carnaham

programme.title: Entre Mundos, (2018)
programme.desc: 2018. Joe, um caminhoneiro assombrado pelo passado, encontra Julie, uma mulher com habilidades espirituais, que o ajuda a resgatar a alma de sua filha em coma. Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Nicolas Cage, Franka Potente, Penelope Mitchell, Garrett Clayton, Hopper Penn, Lydia Hearst, Nailim Sanchez, Richard Pait, Brit Shaw, David Lee Smith Diretor: Maria Pulera

programme.title: Sobreviva a noite, (2019)
programme.desc: 2019. Um intenso filme de ação, que traz Dolph Lundgren como um agente da Interpol protegendo sua esposa e filha de um criminoso implacável e seus mercenários em um vilarejo italiano. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dolph Lundgren, Hal Yamanouchi, Natalie Burn Diretor: Giorgio Bruno

programme.title: Fogo contra Fogo, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Um bombeiro fora de serviço testemunha um assassinato nas mãos de uma gangue de gangsters. Ele entra no programa de proteção a testemunhas até depor, mas não pode se esconder por muito tempo da gangue, então decide agir por conta própria. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Josh Duhamel, Bruce Willis, Rosario Dawson Diretor: David Barrett

programme.title: Refém, (2005)

programme.title: Entrevista com Hitman, (2012)
programme.desc: 2012. Não confie em ninguém, seja frio e nunca perca. Estas são as regras básicas que serviu de base para um assassino profissional se tornasse um dos melhores em seu ramo. Criado nos guetos da Romênia, Victor sabe o valor da vida mais que qualquer um. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Luke Goss, Caroline Tillette, Stephen Marcus, Danny Midwinter..., Patrick Lyster, Philip Whitchurch, Elliot Greene, Danny Midwinter, René Zagger, Ray Panthaki Diretor: Perry Bhandal

programme.title: Caçado, (2003)

programme.desc: 2018. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Dan Ewing, Temuera Morrison, Stephanie Jacobsen, Stephany Jacobsen, Rhiannon Fish, Zac Garred, Izzy Stevens, Charles Jazz Terrier, Charles Mesure, Felix Williamson Diretor: Luke Sparke

programme.title: A Tumba do Diabo, (2009)
programme.desc: 2009. Sob o comando do veterano de guerra Mack , um grupo de mercenários é contratado pela CIA com a missão de resgatar um cientista, que trabalha em uma descoberta arqueológica, no deserto do Oriente Médio. Gêneros: Sci-Fi & Fantasy Elenco: Cuba Gooding Jr. Diretor: Jason Connery

programme.title: Área 51, (2011)
programme.desc: 2011. Quando os repórteres têm acesso à Base Aérea da Área 51, uma falha de segurança transforma a base protegida do governo em um horrível destino de terror. programme.title: Infectados, (2010)

Gêneros: Drama Elenco: Russell Crowe, Olga Kurylenko, Jai Courtney Diretor: Russell Crowe

programme.title: Minha Vida Além do Circo, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. Nascida em uma família de artistas de circo, Laura passou grande parte de sua juventude em turnê com seu pai Bill, um palhaço profissional, e seu assistente de palco, Mandeep. Secretamente, ela anseia por uma vida mais convencional. programme.title: Encontrando o Amor em Nebraska, (2016)
programme.desc: 2016. Kennedy Blaine, uma garota californiana, herda um rancho na pequena cidade de Valentine, em Nebraska. programme.title: The Santa Squad, (2020)
programme.desc: 2020. Allie, uma professora de arte desempregada, aceita um trabalho no Esquadrão do Papai Noel para ajudar um viúvo rico e suas filhas a redescobrirem a magia do Natal. programme.title: Dia Amarelo, (2021)
programme.desc: 2021. O misterioso Dia Amarelo neste acampamento celebra milagres, fé e comunidade, mas para um jovem, é a chance de encontrar seu verdadeiro amor. programme.title: Shelby, (2020)

programme.desc: 2007. Bruno chegou ao Brasil após a 2ª Guerra Mundial e agora sente que está no fim de sua vida, nada mais o motiva. Até que a chegada de Gabriel faz com que ele recupere a alegria em viver. programme.title: Roubo a Máfia, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Tommy e Rosie são um casal apaixonado, mas que acabam presos ao serem flagrados roubando. Após esse deslize, eles tentam ganhar a vida honestamente, mas logo ele se vê envolvido no julgamento de um famoso assassino da máfia. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Sem Evidências, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1993, os adolescentes Damien, Jason e Jessie foram acusados de assassinar brutalmente três crianças na cidade de West Memphis, Estados Unidos. Eles foram condenados e, após uma longa batalha judicial, soltos. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: 6 Balas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após uma missão de resgate mal-sucedida, o mercenário Samson Gália decide abandonar tudo, até ser chamado para uma última missão cujo objetivo é resgatar a filha de um lutador de MMA muito conhecido. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Forças Malignas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. De férias no Camboja, Ben conhece Amber e os dois passam vivem uma intenção paixão. Porém, as férias perfeitas se tornam um pesadelo quando uma entidade maligna começa assombrar a garota, que aos poucos revela um passado sombrio. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Teia de Corrupção, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O lutador Liam sai da prisão com o único desejo de reatar o laço com seu filho. Mas, quando seu irmão se envolve com criminosos de alto escalão, ele não vê alternativa a não ser se arriscar novamente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Uma Beleza Fantástica, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um conto de fadas contemporâneo sobre o surgimento de uma amizade improvável entre uma jovem solitária que sonha ser autora de livros infantis e um viúvo rabugento. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: A Menina e o Leão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mia é uma jovem de 14 anos que sempre teve uma profunda amizade com Charlie, um leão branco da fazenda de sua família. Um dia, seu pai decide vender o felino para caçadores de troféus e ela não vê outra opção além de fugir com Charlie para salvá-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Norman - Confie em Mim, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Norman Oppenheimer é um picareta do mercado financeiro que tenta sua sorte na cidade de Nova York. Tentando ser amigo de todos, ele força seu caminho até se infiltrar no círculo interno de ricaços e de figurões da política. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Ma ma, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após ser diagnosticada com câncer de mama, Magda descobre estar grávida. Além de contar com o apoio de seu novo companheiro e do filho, ela acredita no poder de cura da menina que espera. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Transmissões Sinistras, (1970)

programme.title: Sob o Domínio dos Robôs, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A Terra foi conquistada por Robôs de uma galáxia distante. Os sobreviventes estão confinados em suas casas tentando sobreviver a ameaça constante. Mas, uma gangue de adolescentes pode ser a única esperança. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: À Procura, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Matheus vive desespero, terror e fúria quando descobre que sua filha foi sequestrada. Oito anos depois da tragédia, uma nova pista aparece e agora há esperança de que a jovem ainda esteja viva. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Impulso, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma jovem jornalista é atraída para a órbita de uma série de assassinatos que conecta magnatas da mídia, políticos e elites de Hollywood, embarcando na tarefa impossível de derrubá-los. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Que Assim Seja, Trinity, (1974)
programme.desc: 1974. Um aventureiro protege um garoto que herdou um terreno sob o qual há um rico campo de petróleo. O menino é ameaçado por vilões perigosos que querem prejudicá-lo e tomar a terra. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Bud Spencer, Jack Palance, Francisco Rabal Diretor: Maurizio Lucidi

programme.title: A Marca da Forca, (1968)
programme.desc: 1968. Eles o cravaram de balas. Eles o penduraram pelo pescoço. Eles o deixaram para morrer. Mas eles cometeram dois erros fatais: eles tentaram enforcar o homem errado, e não terminaram o trabalho. Gêneros: Western Elenco: Clint Eastwood, Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle Diretor: Ted Post

programme.title: Com a Corda no Pescoço, (1978)
programme.desc: 1978. Condenado à forca, Henry Moon é capturado enquanto tentava fugir para o México, mas descobre que existe uma lei local que perdoa os crimes de quem se casa com uma mulher solteira ou viúva. programme.title: O Retorno de Frank James, (1940)
programme.desc: 1940. Frank James deixou sua vida de crimes e se tornou um pacífico fazendeiro. Nem quando Clem Tom Grayson, um jovem e grande amigo, lhe conta que Jesse James foi baleado pelas costas pelos irmãos Ford, Frank procura se vingar, pois crê na justiça. programme.desc: 1970. Leonardo registra o momento em que Alejandra e Rodrigo se beijam no novo escritório; Rodrigo ameaça matar Martín para que ele não o denuncie à polícia; Irene discute com Leonardo sobre a situação com Alejandra. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Anzola dá alguns conselhos a Irene sobre seu casamento com Leonardo; Felipe confronta Rodrigo quando ele sai para visitar Martín; María Lucía confessa a Irene que se apaixonou por Leo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Leonardo conversa sobre ter um filho com Irene; Felipe explica a Irene que há alguém por trás do caso de Virginia; Virginia visita Irene e encontra Rodrigo na entrada. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Jimena reclama com Carlos Ernesto por ter permitido que Virginia entrasse nos laboratórios Ferrándiz; Oriana e Ricardo planejam se vingar de Leo; o escritório de Felipe é revirado. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Amor Secreto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Alejandra tranca Irene no banheiro e faz todos acreditarem que ela quer machucá-la; María Lucía teme que sua irmã Virginia não consiga um emprego por causa de Rodrigo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: North Hollywood, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Acabando a escola, um jovem precisa decidir entre o sonho de tornar-se skatista profissional ou ir para a faculdade como seu pai deseja. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Caçador e o Livro Mágico, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Pu Songling é um caçador de demônios que precisa usar toda a sua maestria para salvar as garotas de uma comunidade chinesa de espíritos malignos sequestradores. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Dom da Premonição, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Viúva com o dom da premonição resolve ler a sorte dos moradores da cidade para sustentar os filhos, o que lhe rende a desconfiança dos mais conservadores. Para complicar, ocorre um assassinato cuja solução depende de sua clarividência. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Uma Manhã com Velvet, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A jovem Velvet está desfrutando de uma manhã relaxante em sua casa em Nova York quando Fred aparece, um homem com quem ela namorou no passado e de quem ela não tinha notícias há quase quatro anos. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Salvando o General Yang, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Sete irmãos Yang têm a tarefa de resgatar seu pai, mantido prisioneiro após ir para a batalha com um velho inimigo vingativo. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Retorno do Dragão - A Cidade Perdida, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma cidade dourada se esconde sob as areias da China, mas ela só poderá ser descoberta após a tempestade. E o dia de sua revelação chegou. Um homem deseja possuí-la, e outro, protegê-la. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Último Amor de Casanova, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Casanova é forçado a se exilar em Londres, onde conhece a jovem cortesã Charpillon. Ela o atrai de tal forma que o faz esquecer de todas as mulheres com quem se envolveu até então. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Vale dos Deuses, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A abundância contrasta com a pobreza em três narrativas separadas, apresentando um escritor de classe média, um trilionário excêntrico e uma comunidade Navajo em dificuldades. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Filha de Deus, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O detetive Scott Galban busca a verdade sobre a misteriosa morte de seu parceiro. Enquanto isso, Isabel de la Cruz, uma mulher local que diz ter sido testemunha de um milagre, começa a vivenciar estranhos acontecimentos. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Última Jornada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Com o fim do mundo se aproximando, uma mãe prestes a morrer envia seu filho a uma jornada a um lugar místico que realiza desejos, na esperança que ele possa salvar o mundo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Verdade e Justiça, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em 1870, na Estônia, o jovem Andrés, juntamente com sua esposa, chega a uma fazenda para estabelecer sua nova vida. Desolada e negligenciada entre os pântanos, a propriedade deve ser transformada em um lugar que abrigará a família. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Reino Gelado 3 - Fogo e Gelo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O raro talento de se meter em problemas é o legado da família de Kai e Gerda. Crescidos, os irmãos se metem em um desastre de proporções globais, tudo para encontrar seus pais que estão desaparecidos após serem levados pelo Vento do Norte. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Esqueceram de Nós, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Dois ladrões atrapalhados invadem a casa de um inventor para roubar sua última criação. Mas os cães da vizinhança estão a postos para defender o território. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Faça um Desejo!, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Quatro crianças descobrem uma criatura mágica que concede desejos em uma viagem à praia. Elas só não imaginavam que o vizinho esquisitão da casa ao lado também está de olho nesses poderes. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Teenagers - As Apimentadas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O time campeão de animadoras de torcida, de bairro rico, descobre que sua capitã anterior roubou a coreografia de um time concorrente, do centro da cidade. O campeonato está chegando, e elas precisam correr para criar outra coreografia. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Todos os Caminhos Levam a Roma, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Maggie embarca em uma viagem para Itália, com Summer, sua filha adolescente. Mas ao chegar lá, Summer foge roubando o carro da mãe. Maggie contará com a ajuda de um ex-namorado para encontrar a filha. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Porto Seguro, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma mulher misteriosa se muda para uma pequena cidade e recomeça sua vida. Apesar da moça estar determinada a não formar laços afetivos na nova cidade, ela não consegue cumprir esse objetivo e acaba levantando questionamentos sobre seu passado. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Entrando numa Roubada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Vitor vence um concurso de roteiros e ganha como prêmio R$ 100 mil para produzir um filme. Ele procura seus antigos colegas para participar de "Aceleração Máxima", que conta com assaltos a postos de gasolina, tiros e perseguições no enredo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Retrato do Amor, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Pressionado por sua família para se casar, um fotógrafo de rua se esforça para convencer uma tímida estranha a fingir ser sua noiva. Eles logo desenvolvem um vínculo inesperado que transforma os dois de maneiras que eles não poderiam imaginar. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 1988. Morgana e Dokosai planejam um atentado para acabar com Jiraya e finalmente destruir o Deus Jirai. Para isso eles sequestram Kasumi e a usam para conseguirem o que querem. Oruha se vê obrigada a obedecer as forças do mal para salvar a irmã. programme.title: 1988. Rei Yagyu é sequestrada pela Família dos Feiticeiro e o resgate exigido é a inscrição que revela Pako. Ryu pede ajuda a Toha e os dois traçam um plano para resgatá-la. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura
programme.sub-title: 9 - A Emboscada Família de Feiticeiros Tōha(Jiraiya), Tetsuzan, Rei Yagyū(Kinin Reiha), Ryū Asuka(Yanin Spiker) e Jōnin Barão Owl
programme.desc: Jiraya - O incrível Ninja - T01E09

programme.title: 1985. Quatro cientistas estão no caminho da cidade tecnológica de Tsukuba em uma lancha pelo rio. Quando voltam estão com os cabelos brancos, além disso começam a agir violentamente. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E11

programme.title: 1985. A profecia da Bíblia Galáctica cita a existência de um empréstimo passado dourado que ajudou um herói a derrotar Satan Goss. Macgaren escraviza o povo de uma aldeia em busca do pássaro. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E12

programme.title: 1985. Chegando da Galáxia, os renegados espaciais "Quadridemos" com um único objetivo: destruir Jaspion. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E13

programme.title: 1985. O garoto Katsuya tira uma foto de um monstro no lago. Jaspion vai investigar o misterioso lago. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.sub-title: O perigo na lagoa dos noivos
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E14

programme.title: 1985. O Professor Nanbara captura em uma foto a imagem do empréstimo passo dourado. Jaspion investiga o que aconteceu, mas Macgaren e Iki estão à espera. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.sub-title: Sonho ou ilusão? A imagem dourada
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E15

programme.title: 1985. Kanoko e Kenta fogem da fazenda de Rod e Satie. Jaspion vai atrás das crianças. Enquanto isso, Zampa, Purima e Goru junto com os soldados de MacGaren vêm raptar pessoas. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E16

programme.title: 1985. Nanbara investiga o pÃ¡ssaro dourado. Jaspion continua a procura por Kanoko e Kenta, mas acaba caindo em uma armadilha de Macgaren. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E17

programme.title: 1985. Zampa prepara uma armadilha definitiva para Jaspion. É revelada a relação entre Zampa e os pais de Jaspion e o motivo de suas mortes. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E18

programme.title: 1985. Zampa prepara uma armadilha definitiva para Jaspion. É revelada a relação entre Zampa e os pais de Jaspion e o motivo de suas mortes. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E19

programme.title: 1985. O Assassino Guila é contratado para analisar e derrotar Jaspion com uma estratégia inventada. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Kei Anan, Misa Nirei, Isao Sasaki, Hiroshi Watari Diretor: Toshiaki Kobayashi, Akihira Tojo
programme.desc: O Fantástico Jaspion - T01E20

programme.title: 1988. Toha Yamashi é discípulo e filho adotivo de Tetsuzan, representante do clã ninja Togakure. Para defender a localização de Pako, Toha deve enfrentar ninjas de todo o mundo e impedi-los de usar esse grande poder para o mal. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura
programme.sub-title: 1 - Pako, a Cápsula Miraculosa Hoshinin Retsuga Tōha(Jiraiya)
programme.desc: Jiraya - O incrível Ninja - T01E01

programme.title: 1988. Toha é confrontado pelo poderoso Barão Owl, do Império dos Ninjas. Ele aprende a história da inscrição e descobre que sua missão é mais difícil do que pensava. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Takumi Tsutsui, Megumi Sekiguchi, Takumi Hashimoto, Masaaki Hatsumi Diretor: Akihisa Okamoto, Kaneharu Mitsumura
programme.sub-title: 2 - Barão Owl, o Imperador Ninja Jōnin Barão Owl, Chōnin Benikiba e os Karasutengus Tōha(Jiraiya)
programme.desc: Jiraya - O incrível Ninja - T01E02

programme.title: 2010. A verdadeira identidade de Mysterion finalmente é revelada. Enquanto isso, Guaxinim, desprezado por seus amigos super-heróis, está com sede de vingança. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Adrien Beard, April Stewart, Eric Stough, Jessica Makinson, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Sebastian Yu, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T14E12

programme.title: 2010. Guaxinim e amigos se encontram à mercê de Cartman, que agora tem o senhor das trevas, Cthulhu, trabalhando para ele. Kenny luta contra a maldição dos seus superpoderes através do seu alter ego, Mysterion. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Adrien Beard, April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T14E13

programme.title: 2012. É hora de Butters começar uma jornada onde seguirá os passos de seus ancestrais Havaianos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T16E11

programme.title: 2013. A temporada de compras de fim de ano começa e os garotos tentam descobrir como enfrentar a correria no shopping para conseguir bons preços em games. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T17E07

programme.title: 2013. A guerra dos consoles aumenta enquanto grupos de compradores se apertam no shopping em antecipação à Black Friday. Enquanto isso, Cartman busca vingança contra a Princesa Kenny. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.sub-title: Um fogo que não se apaga
programme.desc: South Park - T17E08

programme.title: 2013. As crianças de South Park estão interpretando os personagens de Game of Thrones. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T17E09

programme.title: 2015. Neste novo episódio de South Park, Kenny está tentando sair do ciclo da pobreza e, para isso, arruma um novo emprego: ele começa a trabalhar na City Wok. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt, Garefino, Anne, Agnone Ii, Frank C., Makinson, Jessica, Parker, Trey, Stone Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T19E03

programme.title: 2018. Os cidadãos de South Park estão em perigo e as crianças descobrem que apenas Al Gore pode ajudá-los. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T22E06

programme.title: 1997. Cartman conta para seus amigos sobre o seu sonho em que apareciam uns alienígenas que o abduzem e lhe introduzem uma sonda anal. Mas ao que parece, não foi apenas um sonho, já que algo está enlouquecendo as vacas deste pequeno vilarejo. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E01

programme.title: 1997. O avô de Stan está fazendo 102 e quer se matar, mas como não pode fazer isso sozinho, pede a ajuda de Stan. Enquanto isso, a senhora Broflovski protesta contra um famoso programa da televisão um tanto quanto inapropriado. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E06

programme.title: 1997. Kenny é esmagado pela Estação Espacial Mir e se transforma em um zumbi que dá início a uma enorme epidemia. Entretanto, o doutor diagnostica todos como se fosse apenas um caso de conjutivite. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E07

programme.title: 1997. Os rapazes encontram um objeto misterioso em uma escavação escolar e saem no jornal. Barbra Streisand aparece na cidade buscando o tal objeto, pois é a última peça necessária para que ela possa se transformar em um monstro japonês gigante. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T01E12

programme.title: 1998. Uma onda de crimes toma conta de South Park, galinhas são molestadas e Barbrady pede demissão. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T02E03

programme.title: 1998. O Chef está sendo processado por tentar obter os direitos autorais de uma canção que escreveu há 20 anos atrás. Para ajudá-lo nesta batalha, os garotos organizam um concerto para arrecadar dinheiro. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T02E14

programme.title: 1999. Vários habitantes de South Park estão ficando cada vez mais furiosos, e sem alguma razão aparente. Randy é o principal responsável para descobrir uma solução para este problema. Enquanto isso, Kyle tenta "conseguir uma ereção". Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E02

programme.title: 1999. Cartman, Kyle e Stan enganam Tweek e Craig para que eles lutem um contra o outro. Enquanto isso, um dos professores está sendo atormentado por uma recordação de sua falecida namorada, e Kenny conquista um homem rico na aula de cozinha. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E04

programme.title: 1999. A mãe de Cartman dá um presente para ajudá-lo a ganhar o concurso de soletrar. Trata-se de um "macaco da fonética". Neste concurso, os rapazes conhecem Marc e Rebecca, dois irmãos que não vão para a escola, pois estudam em suas casas. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T03E13

programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. Enquanto isso, Kenny tenta evitar que seus pais tenham outro filho. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.sub-title: Cartman entra para a ASNAMB (Associação De Sósias Norte-Americanos Do Marlon Brando)
programme.desc: South Park - T04E06

programme.title: 2001. Cartman encontra um carregamento cheio de fetos abortados após o tombamento de um caminhão em um barranco. Em seguida, ele decide entrar para um novo negócio supostamente lucrativo: a venda de fetos mortos. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Isaac Hayes, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Eric Stough, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T05E13

programme.title: 2002. Os rapazes ganham muitos doces em um concurso, mas para conseguir o grande prêmio, precisam do cupom vencedor, que é aquele que ficou com Kenny antes de morrer. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T06E12

programme.title: 2005. Kenny consegue o último videogame portátil da cidade. Porém, ele morre ao chegar no nível 60 do jogo, e vai ao céu, onde fica sabendo que Deus o matou de propósito, já que precisam dele para que salve o céu de um ataque de Satanás. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T09E04

programme.title: 2008. Numa homenagem ao filme de 1981, Heavy Metal, os garotos estão tentando convencer Kenny a largar a última droga da moda que viciou rapidamente os alunos do ensino médio. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Matt Stone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
programme.desc: South Park - T12E03

programme.title: 2009. Kenny leva sua namorada ao show dos Jonas Brothers, mas com segundas intenções. Gêneros: Comedy Elenco: April Stewart, Jhon Hansen, Matt Stone, Mickey Ramos, Milan Agnone, Mona Marshall, Trey Parker Diretor: Matt Stone, Trey Parker
